name: Radio Online
description: Automated online radio streaming plugin using Liquidsoap. Stream audio to Icecast servers with weekly playlist scheduling via Liquidsoap Telnet control.
overview: Automated online radio streaming via Liquidsoap to Icecast servers with weekly playlist scheduling. Assign Jellyfin playlists to specific day/time slots. Requires a Liquidsoap Docker container running alongside Jellyfin.

versions.changelog:
NEW: Playback reporting to Jellyfin statistics - each track played on the radio now increments PlayCount and updates LastPlayedDate, enabling smart playlists (most played, least played, recently played, etc.)
NEW: Configurable option 'Report playback to Jellyfin statistics' in plugin settings
NEW: Liquidsoap queue.current_track telnet command for track monitoring
FIX: Playback reporting filters out off-air audio and external radio streams
IMPROVE: Path-to-item mapping preserved through shuffle for accurate reporting

FIX: Schedule now stops at exact programmed time - inverted clear+skip order (clear queue FIRST, then skip current track) so skip falls through to off-air instead of starting next queued track
FIX: Second playlist now properly takes priority when schedules overlap - clears queue and immediately loads next schedule
FIX: Times no longer drift/accumulate between schedules
FIX: Exception handler now clears Liquidsoap queue to prevent orphaned tracks from playing after errors
IMPROVE: Near-end polling checks every 1 second (instead of 5) when less than 30 seconds remain in schedule slot for precise timing

FIX: Dark theme dropdown menus in scheduling section (option backgrounds match Jellyfin dark theme)
FIX: Minute selector now shows all 60 minutes (00-59) instead of 5-minute increments
FIX: Schedule now ends at exact programmed time - skips current track and triggers crossfade instead of waiting for song to finish
FIX: Playlist switching at exact time with crossfade transition (skip + clear + load)
IMPROVE: Remaining time check prevents songs from playing past schedule end

FIX: Telnet Broken pipe - SendCommandAsync now retries once after reconnecting on IOException
FIX: Schedule not followed - now tracks full schedule key (day+time+playlist) instead of just playlist ID
FIX: Queue clear now retries up to 3 times on failure to ensure schedule transitions work reliably
FIX: Status endpoint shows correct telnet state after reconnect
